class.name: GaussianSplatContainer
class.brief_description: Container node that merges child splat nodes into a single optimized dataset.
class.description: GaussianSplatContainer collects GaussianSplatNode3D and GaussianSplatWorld3D children, merges their splat data into a single GaussianData resource with spatial chunking, and can apply the result to a target renderer or node. This enables rendering multiple assets as one draw call for improved performance. The container supports automatic merging on ready, chunk-based spatial subdivision, and export to GaussianSplatWorld resources.

method.name: set_merge_on_ready
method.description: When enabled, child nodes are automatically merged when this container receives the READY notification.

method.name: is_merge_on_ready
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if automatic merge on ready is enabled.

method.name: set_chunk_size
method.description: Sets the spatial chunk subdivision size in world units. Smaller values create more chunks with tighter bounding boxes, improving frustum culling precision at the cost of more draw batches.

method.name: get_chunk_size
method.description: Returns the current chunk size in world units.

method.name: set_hide_children_after_merge
method.description: When enabled, child splat nodes are hidden after merging to prevent double rendering.

method.name: get_hide_children_after_merge
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if children are hidden after merging.

method.name: set_apply_to_target_on_merge
method.description: When enabled, the merged data is automatically applied to the node at [member target_node_path] after each merge operation.

method.name: is_apply_to_target_on_merge
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if automatic target application is enabled.

method.name: set_target_node_path
method.description: Sets the node path of the target node that receives merged data when [member apply_to_target_on_merge] is enabled. The target must be a GaussianSplatNode3D or GaussianSplatWorld3D.

method.name: get_target_node_path
method.description: Returns the current target node path.

method.name: merge_children
method.description: Merges all child splat node data into a single GaussianData resource with spatial chunking. If [member hide_children_after_merge] is enabled, children are hidden. If [member apply_to_target_on_merge] is enabled, the result is applied to the target node.

method.name: clear_merged_data
method.description: Clears the merged data and chunk information, releasing the internal GaussianData resource.

method.name: apply_to_renderer
method.description: Applies the merged data and chunk layout to the given [param renderer]. Returns [constant OK] on success, or [constant ERR_UNAVAILABLE] if no merged data exists.

method.name: apply_to_node
method.description: Applies the merged data to a GaussianSplatNode3D or GaussianSplatWorld3D [param node]. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: merge_children_to_node
method.description: Merges all children and immediately applies the result to the given [param node]. Combines [method merge_children] and [method apply_to_node] in a single call. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: export_world_resource
method.description: Creates and returns a new GaussianSplatWorld resource from the current merged data and chunk layout. Returns [code]null[/code] if no merged data is available.

method.name: get_merged_data
method.description: Returns the merged GaussianData resource, or [code]null[/code] if no merge has been performed.

method.name: get_chunk_count
method.description: Returns the number of spatial chunks created during the last merge operation.

method.name: get_chunk_sizes
method.description: Returns an array containing the splat count for each spatial chunk.

method.name: get_chunk_aabbs
method.description: Returns an array of AABB values representing the bounding box of each spatial chunk.

members.member: When enabled, children are automatically merged when this container is ready.
Spatial subdivision chunk size in world units.
When enabled, child nodes are hidden after merging to avoid double rendering.
When enabled, merged data is automatically applied to the target node after merging.
Path to the target node that receives merged data.
